title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Saved themes collection supports create, edit, and delete with list rows and derived counts updating from shared application state
At least two distinct views or interaction modes are switchable without full page navigation
Domain state beyond CRUD is implemented (filters, status/priority/mode, or equivalent) and recomputes visible results from the shared collection
Renders visible validation feedback when create is submitted with empty required fields, and the collection count does not increase
Saved themes list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Zustand holds saved themes, active options, and tab/device UI — shared across components
Implemented with React, Zustand, and Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist themes or editor state
Manages the saved themes collection only in component-local useState rather than Zustand
Dark studio shell with Preview/Editor and Saved Themes density remains tool-like
Empty Saved Themes state is visually present when the collection is empty
Presents only a static marketing page without Monaco or saved themes management
Required hover animations are present; tab indicator and preview updates animate as specified
Tab/mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover washes on buttons, rows, or tabs so the studio feels static on pointer hover
